root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Philosophy Department. Securing the target.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is Philosophy Department. Securing the target.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Philosophy Department. Securing the target.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you? I thought Wizard doesn't exist anymore...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you? I thought Wizard doesn't exist anymore...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wizard? You seem to know nothing.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Wizard? You seem to know nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That <color=#ffd34c>Fragment</color> belonged to us originally.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That <color=#ffd34c>Fragment</color> belonged to us originally.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hand it over, and we will spare you your life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hand it over, and we will spare you your life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hand it over, and we will spare you your life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fragment? When you say "Fragment..." you mean Toto, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fragment? When you say "Fragment..." you mean Toto, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fragment? When you say "Fragment..." you mean Toto, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but I'm not handing Toto over to anyone!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but I'm not handing Toto over to anyone!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but I'm not handing Toto over to anyone!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because Toto is... my friend!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because Toto is... my friend!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because Toto is... my friend!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's less than a beast, a Fragment that communes with humans... A rare case, indeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's less than a beast, a Fragment that communes with humans... A rare case, indeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's less than a beast, a Fragment that communes with humans... A rare case, indeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Change of plans. Secure both the Fragment and host to be used as our research material.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Change of plans. Secure both the Fragment and host to be used as our research material.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arms and legs are of no concern. Use all means necessary to subdue her!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Arms and legs are of no concern. Use all means necessary to subdue her!

root.m_Talk_DEU: You also want to fight, don't you, Toto?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not running away this time. Just like how Toto protects me, I'm going to protect Toto.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not running away this time. Just like how Toto protects me, I'm going to protect Toto.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Because if I'm with Toto, I'm not a scaredy-cat!
